title: Janamaithri

title: Oru Indian Pranayakadha
desc: Aymanam Sidharthan, a politician, and Irene, a filmmaker, fall in love with each other.

title: Oru Indian Pranayakadha
desc: Aymanam Sidharthan, a leader of the youth wing of a local political party, hopes to succeed in politics. Irene, an Indo-Canadian woman making a documentary on Indian politics, is smitten with him.

title: Oru Indian Pranayakadha
desc: Aymanam, an ambitious youth politician, wins Irene's heart-an insightful Indo-Canadian filmmaker chronicling politics-blending romance with ambition in a captivating tale of love and aspirations.

title: RRR
desc: Two friends on opposing sides of the British rule chart out a luminary path of freedom.

desc: Rini Iype Mattummel is all about quick cash! He's determined to make a fortune fast and isn't afraid to take risks to achieve his money-making goals.

title: Comali
desc: Ravi awakens from a long coma, realizing he's in his 30s and has missed 16 years of life. He grapples with adapting to the modern world and its technological advancements.
